title: Pula, Istria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Pula, Istria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Pula is a city in Istria with a population of 57,460. The jewel of Istria, home to one of the best-preserved Roman amphitheaters in the world, with stunning coastal scenery, truffle cuisine, and a rich Venetian heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
